1.0.0.name: de.mrunknownde.gittool
1.0.0.description: A lightweight, integrated Git panel for Unity. Ideal for VRChat World/Avatar Creators to easily push commits directly from the editor to Gitea/GitHub/GitLab and other Git hosting services.
